roa.docketEntryComment: DEFT'S PC851,8 PETITION FIND OF FACTUAL INNOCENCE FILED

CAL: PC 851,8 PETITION FOR FINDING OF FACTUAL INNOCENCE/NP/X: COURT MAKESA FINDING THAT THE MOTION IS TIMELY FILED BUT IS NOT RIPE, STATUTE OF LIMITATIONS EXPIRES 06-29-18,/CONTD: TO SET EVIDENTIARY HEARING ON DEFENSE PC 851,8 PETITION/
/CAL: PC 851,8 PETITION FOR FINDING OF FACTUAL INNOCENCE/NP/X: COURT MAKESA FINDING THAT THE MOTION IS UNTIMELY FILED- WITHOUT PREJUDICE,/CONTD: SAME, AND FURTHER PROCEEDINGS RE ISSUE OF GOOD CAUSE
/CAL: TO SET EVIDENTIARY HEARING ON DEFENSE PC 851,8 PETITION AND RIPENESSFINDING/NP/X: WITHDRAWN BY COUNSEL FOR DEFENDANT,
/CAL:TS EVID HRG ON DEF PC 851,8, PETITION AND RIPENESS FINDING (ARR DATE 063015)/NP/CONTD:SAME, PER DEFENSE COUNSEL'S REQUEST/
/CAL: TO SET EVIDENTIARY HEARING ON DEFENSE PC 851,8 PETITION/NP/CONTD: TOSET EVIDENTIARY HEARING ON DEFENSE PC 851,8 PETITION AND RIPENESS FINDING
/CAL: DEFENSE PC 851,8 PETITION RE ISSUE OF GOOD CAUSE/NP/CONTD: SAME, PERCOURT'S MOTION
